<!--
MODEL SELECTION (change the label above):
  model:haiku   — trivial fixes (typo, simple lint, copy change)
  model:sonnet  — standard work (default — features, refactors, bug fixes)
  model:opus    — hard problems (architecture, gnarly debugging, performance)

NOTE: If your description is unstructured or the scope is broad, the agent will
post a "triage proposal" comment rather than starting to code. Review the proposal,
edit it directly if you want changes, then apply the `agent:approved` label to
have the agent execute it. Well-structured issues skip triage and go straight to code.
-->
